appStore.name: DreamTone - Sleep Sounds
appStore.subtitle: Mix ambient sounds for better sleep
appStore.description:
DreamTone helps you fall asleep faster with beautiful ambient sounds. Mix and match from a curated library of nature sounds, rain, white noise, and more to create your perfect sleep soundtrack.

Key Features:
• 20+ high-quality ambient sounds across 5 categories
• Sound mixing — layer up to 4 sounds with individual volume controls
• Sleep timer with gentle fade-out
• Save your favorite sound mixes for quick access
• Beautiful dark-first design made for bedtime
• Background playback — sounds continue when your phone is locked
• Works completely offline — no internet required

Categories:
🌿 Nature: Forest Birds, Crickets, Wind, River, Thunderstorm
🌧 Rain: Light Rain, Heavy Rain, Rain on Tent, Rain on Window, Thunder & Rain
🌊 Water: Ocean Waves, Waterfall, Babbling Stream
📻 White Noise: White Noise, Pink Noise, Brown Noise, Fan
☕ Urban: Café, Fireplace, Train Journey

DreamTone Premium ($24.99/year or $3.99/month):
• 30+ premium sounds including Jungle Night, Tropical Rain, Airplane Cabin, and more
• Mix up to 4 sounds simultaneously
• Unlimited sleep timer
• Ad-free experience
• Exclusive sound packs

Designed for sleep, not distraction. No social features, no complicated menus — just beautiful sounds to help you rest.

By Abraham Oladotun Foundation, a nonprofit organization.
appStore.keywords: sleep sounds, white noise, ambient sounds, rain sounds, sleep timer, nature sounds, sound mixer, relaxation, meditation, bedtime, sleep aid, brown noise, pink noise, ocean waves, ASMR
